creator: stacey@vickiandstacey.com
text:
Hi Mezz,

On Sun, 03 Feb 2008, Jeremy Messenger wrote:

>  On Sun, 03 Feb 2008 15:45:15 -0600, Stacey Roberts 
>  <stacey@vickiandstacey.com> wrote:
> 
> > Hi Mezz,
> >    Good to hear from you..,
> >
> > On Sun, 03 Feb 2008, Jeremy Messenger wrote:
> >
> >>  Today, I just finished did the clean installation of desktop (included
> >>  linux-opera) and I can't reproduce it. Do you have Linux emulation 
> >> enable?
> >>
> >
> > I would have thought so..,
> >
> > I've rechecked the manual again, and am trying to see if specifically
> > including "options COMPAT_LINUX" into the kernel helps..,
> >
> > buildkernel running at the moment.
> 
>  You can load linux module (kldload linux) instead for more quicker. I have 
>  linux_enable="YES" in my /etc/rc.conf.

That's the test kindly suggested by another responder that's pointed me to
linux emulation issues. I *do* have this set in /etc/rc.conf, that's why I'm
trying to see if setting the option in the kernel might produce other
results..,

Thanks.

Regards,

S Roberts

> 
>  Cheers,
>  Mezz
> 
> > Thanks.
> >
> > Regards,
> >
> > S Roberts
> >
> >>  Cheers,
> >>  Mezz
>
